customerName.title: Customer Full Name
customerName.description: Full name of the customer (first + last, e.g. 'Priya Sharma').

email.title: Email
email.description: Customer email address for booking confirmation.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Customer phone number. Optional for Standard Drive; REQUIRED for Experience Drive (delivery coordinator calls).

vehicleModelName.title: Vehicle Model Name
vehicleModelName.description: Electra GT, Electra SUV, Electra Sedan, or Electra Crossover.

preferredDate.title: Preferred Date
preferredDate.description: Date for the test drive. Must be an explicit Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Convert natural-language like 'this Saturday' before calling.

preferredTime.title: Preferred Time
preferredTime.description: Time for the test drive. MUST include AM/PM (e.g. '2:00 PM') or be 24-hour with hour greater than 12 (e.g. '14:00'). Ambiguous times like '2:00' are rejected by the action — clarify with the customer first.

dealershipId.title: Dealership Account Id
dealershipId.description: Account Id of the assigned dealership (from Find Nearest Dealership output).

channel.title: Booking Channel
channel.description: Channel the booking came from: Web Chat, WhatsApp, SMS, or Phone. Defaults to Web Chat.

driveType.title: Drive Type
driveType.description: Standard Drive (default) or Experience Drive (home delivery).
